ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the participant (e.g., tester, user) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization or company the participant belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the organization */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contact purposes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the participant's details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who provided the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided by the participant */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was submitted */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feedback category */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the feedback (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the feedback (e.g., Open, In Progress, Resolved) */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature the feedback is related to */,
  "screenshot_url" TEXT /* URL of any screenshot or attachment related to the feedback */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was submitted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES feedback_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "design_elements" (
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each design element */,
  "element_description" TEXT /* Description of the design element */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature the design element is part of */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the design element (e.g., Draft, Active, Deprecated) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the design element was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the design element */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("element_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_elements_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "concerns" (
  "concern_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each concern */,
  "design_element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related design element */,
  "concern_text" TEXT /* Text of the concern provided by participants */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the concern (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the concern (e.g., Open, In Progress, Resolved) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the concern was raised */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the concern */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("concern_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_concerns_design_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_element_id") REFERENCES design_elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "proposed_solutions" (
  "solution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each proposed solution */,
  "concern_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related concern */,
  "solution_text" TEXT /* Text of the proposed solution */,
  "importance" TEXT /* Importance level of the proposed solution (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the proposed solution (e.g., Proposed, Under Review, Approved, Rejected) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the solution was proposed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the solution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("solution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proposed_solutions_concern_id FOREIGN KEY ("concern_id") REFERENCES concerns ("concern_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role (e.g., tester, designer, project manager) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object or text field to store permissions for the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "design_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each design change */,
  "design_element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related design element */,
  "solution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the proposed solution applied */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the design change (e.g., Planned, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was initiated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_changes_design_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_element_id") REFERENCES design_elements ("element_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_changes_solution_id FOREIGN KEY ("solution_id") REFERENCES proposed_solutions ("solution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the feedback analysis and trends */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., Weekly, Monthly) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the report (e.g., Draft, Final) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who received the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the notification (e.g., Sent, Read, Unread) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the feedback category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feedback category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "design_priority" (
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each priority entry */,
  "design_element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design element */,
  "importance_level" TEXT /* Importance level assigned to the design element (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the priority entry (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the priority was set */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the priority */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("priority_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_priority_design_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_element_id") REFERENCES design_elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "design_element_feedback" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link entry */,
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related feedback */,
  "design_element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related design element */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_element_feedback_feedback_id FOREIGN KEY ("feedback_id") REFERENCES feedback ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_element_feedback_design_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_element_id") REFERENCES design_elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the feature (e.g., Draft, Active, Deprecated) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feature was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)
